sql_array: CREATE DICTIONARY dict_name (id UInt64, parent_id Nullable(UInt64)) PRIMARY KEY id;
SELECT id, dictIsIn('dict_name', id, 1) AS is_child FROM dict_name WHERE is_child = 1;
UPDATE dict_name SET parent_id = 3 WHERE id = 4;
SELECT id, dictIsIn('dict_name', id, 2) AS is_ancestor FROM dict_name WHERE is_ancestor = 1;
